name: The Palaces of The Mind: Chapter One
short_description: The Palaces of The Mind is a mystical 2D adventure that tells the story of how most ordinary day of two friends turned into a nightmare. Becca, her owl Dolly, and Meg must now escape from the world of the animeds, forest creatures that can smell fear.
detailed_description:
First Episode of "Not a Good Fairy Tale"

The Palaces of The Mind is a 2D mystical adventure that tells the story of how the most ordinary day of two friends turned into a nightmare. Becca, her owl Dolly, and Meg must now escape from the world of animeds, forest creatures that can smell fear.

Over time, they realize that this world is not as simple as it seems at first glance, but finding all the secrets will not be easy.

Will anyone help them on this adventure? Who knows? Maybe it will be you?

Key Features

  • [A mystical story about the escape of two girls in the world of animeds]

  • [The ability to change the main character]

  • [Puzzles of varying difficulty]

  • [Easter eggs and hidden plot twists]

  • [Original soundtrack]
